feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: occurs obsolete abap
entry.content:
hi,

I need to create a table that takes a structure that I created in SE11.
I used the Occors command:

DATA: gt_test LIKE ZTEST OCCURS 1000.

what can I use instead of occurs?

thank you

entry.title: How to continue executing batch job even after error
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement where i have to continue batch job even after error and the job should not cancel and the message should appear as error not like information or warning in the job log.

entry.title: How to create/CHANGE RFQ in MM through BAPI or Function module?
entry.content:
I have a requirement to create/change an RFQ in MM. Cany anone guide and advise in this matter.

As, I could not find any such thing for Create/Change an RFQ.

entry.title: How can PA2001 be reinstate to previous state when IT2001 get changed mistakenly of all emps.
entry.content:
Hi,

All emplyees' IT2001 for one of absent subtype has been replaced with another absent subtype and that have effected the whole payroll for the month.

How can IT2001 be reinstate to previous state when IT2001 get changed mistakenly of all emps.

Please Help out in this matter.

How can we remove this replacement with the original absent subtype when we are not sure for each employee which subtype has been replaced with a specific absent subtype.

It means Replaced Leave Subtype is unknown and with which it is replaced is known.

Now, need to correct that Info Type 2001 for all employees, so that the Payroll can be matched with the Simulation that generated earlier to this change.

How, can I retrieve History of IT2001 and then how can I replace the effected Subtype?

entry.title: Difference b/w these subquery and inner join? I am getting different results.
entry.content:
Hello!
I get correct amount of entries with below query:

    lt =   SELECT tab1.act_id
                    FROM table1 AS tab1
                    INNER JOIN :it_score AS score
                    ON score.id = tab1.id
                    WHERE tab1.bb IN (
                                      -- BBIDs
                                      SELECT tab2.BB_ID
                                      FROM table2 AS tab2
                                      INNER JOIN :it_score AS score
                                      ON score.id = tab2.id
                                      WHERE tab2.si = :iv_si
                                         ) ;

But more with below query, which is not as expected but I want to go for a join instead of subquery.
I understand this could be because of how data is in tables as well, but I also want to know why.
I have failed after multiple tries.

lt =  SELECT tab1.act_id
      FROM table1 AS tab1
      INNER JOIN :it_score AS score
        ON score.id = tab1.id
      INNER JOIN table2 AS tab2
        ON tab1.bb = tab2.BB_ID           
      AND score.id = tab2.id              
      WHERE tab2.si = :iv_si;

this is also wrong result, idk why:

lt =  SELECT tab1.act_id
      FROM table1 AS tab1
      INNER JOIN :it_score AS score
        ON score.id = tab1.id
      INNER JOIN table2 AS tab2
        ON tab1.bb = tab2.BB_ID     
      INNER JOIN :it_score AS score2     
      ON score2.id = tab2.id           
      WHERE tab2.si = :iv_si;

some help would be appreciated, how do I get same result as my subquery?

Thanks

entry.title: How to create a Fiori tile for a new RAP fiori app in SAP S/4 HANA cloud public edition
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am working on the last version 08 2024 of SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition.

I would like to know how to create a new Fiori tile for a Fiori application created automatically with ADT with the " Generate ABAP Repository objects " feature.

Here is what I did:

  • First I created a custom table in ADT: 

  • Used the option " Generate ABAP Repository objects " to generate a RAP application and a Fiori screen allowing me to maintain records in my custom table easily

Several objects got thus generated and I could create/edit and delete records in my custom table easily from a web browser

Now all is good.

The only point I want to add is a new Fiori tile that would allow users to click on it, in order to access this custom table and to maintain the records directly. Also, this new Fiori tile should be "searchable" when user writes its name in the main search bar: 

How to achieve this please? Does anyone know?

Thank you all

entry.title: Screen field value wasn't passed into search help import parameter
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

For the following material batch search help, I can't get material number (MATNR), which was input in the screen, in the search help function exit. What could be reason of the issue? 

Field MATNR and CHARG (batch) are in the same screen structure.

 

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: Access Control Objects
entry.content:
Hi Amigos,

I wanted to ask like in Access Control Objects, what are all clauses used?

Thank you,

kaushik

SAP Access Control for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Value help in analytical query
entry.content:
Hi all,

In query browser, value help of org division only has one column.

While in VA01, you can see the restriction and output columns of other relevant fields.

Can value help of query also display like that?

And sometimes a query field has relationship to other fields, it looks weird if only one field displays.

 

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: How to completely refresh table control in dynpro
entry.content: Solved.

entry.title: Change Logs when using Fiori Applications
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Recently we have started to look at activating Standard Fiori applications for standard business transactions where users can Manage documents like Sales documents, Purchasing documents and Billing documents. We have noticed few things and want to understand how can this can be handled in a better way.

  • Origin of transaction missing when creating documents from Fiori. For example when we post a JV in finance from Fb01 we can see in the header of the accounting document the transaction is FB01 or FB70. But when we use Fiori to post this we see this empty. I can understand that BAPI is used for all updates but will be good to have either the App id or some kind of reference populated. this becomes a audit issue to track from where the document originates. The same goes for Change logs in Sales documents - Missing Tcode on the change logs. 
  • All the custom screen validation that was done in our PBO/PAI are not being called and again I assume its due to BAPI. Do we need to completely redesign all the validations or is there any other smarter approach? 
  • Attaching workflow into Standard Fiori apps - Sometimes we also see that business needs to have a approval flow for some master data records before being created. We can go to SAP build and do it or create custom Fiori app and enable workflow. Has anyone done it with using the standard Fiori application and attaching a workflow for approval and then once approved the master data getting created?  (this can be more a custom requirement) 
  • Another this is that the user is not having VA01 or VA02 access in the PFCG roles but when we activated Manage Sales order Version2 app and try to use the user got access to create the Sales order for the document type enabled via Fiori. We have only added the UI roles and not changes the existing role of the user. Again is this because of BAPI and how well can this be restricted using standard capabilities?

 

Appreciate your insights.

 

Br,

Vijay V

entry.title: MRBR were releasing invoices that are not expected to be released.
entry.content: I have a custom program that passes a BDC to MRBR. However, the MRBR were releasing invoices that are not mentioned in the BDC. For instance, it released vendor 1000. However, I have specified that only the vendor 0010 should be released.

entry.title: Fetching wrong exchange rate from tcurr in fm CONVERT_TO_LOCAL_CURRENCY
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am using FM CONVERT_TO_LOCAL_CURRENCY to convert currency from EUR to GBP. 

CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERT_TO_LOCAL_CURRENCY'
EXPORTING
client = sy-mandt
date = sy-datum
foreign_amount = lv_f_amount
foreign_currency = lv_fcurr
local_currency = iv_waers
rate = 0
type_of_rate = 'P'
read_tcurr = 'X'
IMPORTING
local_amount = lv_locamt
exchange_rate = lv_exchange_rate
EXCEPTIONS
no_rate_found = 1
overflow = 2
OTHERS = 3.

It is converting value but the exchange rate it takes is wrong. In table tcurr we have maintained this rate

but the rate it is taking is the one highlighed

this is the data I am giving directly into the fm

293725.89

The result of fm and my code is same. There is no alternative currency maintained in tcurf. 

 

Please suggest what I should do.

entry.title: Add custom GUI Status AT Maintaining ztable (SM30)
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can a maintain view of a ztable can be custom to add a new (custom) gui status here.

For example: there's a select box in the table and I want to custom a select all of check boxes in SM30 here?

Best Regards,

Sutthawee

entry.title: Do we have the relevant S4 HANA standard V2/V4 API for the BAPI "BAPI_ACC_ACTIVITY_ALLOC_POST"?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

As part of clean core methodology we need to implement the similar call of posting the activity hours on WBS timesheet in S4 from CPI. A similar BAPI "BAPI_ACC_ACTIVITY_ALLOC_POST" is there but wanted to know do we have the relevant S4 HANA standard V2/V4 API for similar BAPI functionality?

Thanks,

Ahmed

entry.title: Error updating ADT in Eclipse 2023-09
entry.content:
I have received attached error when updating ABAP Development Tools in Eclipse Version: 2023-09 (4.29.0).

The update was not successful due to missing dependency tools for each tools. 

Also downloaded 2024-06 and 2024-09 version and tried to install ADT by referring https://tools.eu1.hana.ondemand.com/ but faced same issue.

Is there any workaround for this?

or we have to wait until it is fixed. Any idea when it will be solved?

entry.title: Screen field value wasn't passed into search help import parameter
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

For the following material batch search help, I can't get material number (MATNR), which was input in the screen, in the search help function exit. What could be reason of the issue? 

Field MATNR and CHARG (batch) are in the same screen structure.

Regards,

Eric

entry.title: SAP + OpenText for ABAPers
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I had bought and completed a course named " OpenText Extended Enterprise Content Management " in UDEMY.

It is 4 hour online course and there is no mention of SAP or ABAP in the entire course.

There is one more course called SAP Vendor Invoice Management(VIM) by OpenText which I think is for Functional Consultants ( MM ).

I am an experienced ABAP Consultant and would like to know what would be the appropriate course for ABAPers when it comes to OpenText.

And also what is xECM ? Is it also related to OpenText ?

Kindly share your expertise in this area.

Thanks,
K.Kiran

entry.title: Examples or demos for the Open-source ABAP2XLSX library
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I understand that the open-source ABAP2XLSX library provides enhanced flexibility in formatting and content control when exporting data to Excel. With ABAP2XLSX, we can handle cell colors, borders, and other Excel features that are not supported by the standard ALV Excel download functionality. Could you please share any available examples or demos showcasing these capabilities?

Thank you.

entry.title: ABAP RAP: How to call the default function with multiple instance
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to add some specify logic to determine default value with multiple instance, only if all selected instances have the same status, then the default value can be determined, otherwise, the value should be empty.
I have added annotation @ui.lineItem: [{ type: #FOR_ACTION, dataAction: 'ChangeStatus', invocationGrouping: #CHANGE_SET }] in metadata extensions, I found that all methods are called as a group except the default function.

How could I implement this requirement?

Best Regards,
Wei
